headline: General Dynamics (GD) Stock Still Looks Like A Bargain On A 116% Five Year Run
summary: After a 116.0% total return over the past five years, General Dynamics is trading near US$369.50 per share. Both its intrinsic value estimate using a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) approach and its earnings multiples still point to the stock being priced below what the underlying cash flows may justify. A 116.0% gain over five years suggests General Dynamics has already rewarded long term holders. Any hint of remaining undervaluation therefore matters more for new money considering an entry...

headline: Prosegur Cybersecurity Names William "Bill" Phillips President of North American Operations
summary: DEERFIELD BEACH, Fla., July 15, 2026--Prosegur Cybersecurity, the North American cybersecurity division of Prosegur, today announced that William "Bill" Phillips has been named president of its North American operations. Phillips assumed the role in June 2026 and is charged with leading the division’s U.S. growth strategy.

headline: General Dynamics (GD) Names New Top Lawyer As Marine Systems Earnings Stay Strong
summary: General Dynamics (NYSE:GD) recently reported strong operating earnings growth in its Marine Systems segment, highlighting performance in submarine and destroyer programs. The company announced the retirement of its long-serving general counsel and the planned promotion of his deputy to the role. These updates arrive as investors assess operational execution and governance at a major U.S. defense contractor ahead of upcoming quarters. For investors tracking defense contractors, General...
